evals.prompt: Posso enviar esta proposta comercial ao cliente? Vale €8.000 e é a primeira proposta deste tipo que fazemos.
evals.expected_output: A full checklist-driven review with a ship/fix-first/escalate verdict backed by evidence, plus judge-panel invocation given the deal value and first-of-type criteria.
expectations: The skill calls kb_search for the commercial proposal type checklist from quality/checklists/ before running any review.
Because no checklist exists for a first-of-type proposal, the skill drafts the checklist inline and ingests it before proceeding.
The judge-panel workflow is invoked because the deal value is ≥ €5,000 AND this is the first deliverable of its type.
Every checklist dimension result cites specific evidence from the proposal content — no uncited verdict elements.
The final verdict is exactly one of ship / fix-first / escalate and names the owning head for the routing decision.

evals.prompt: Review this client report before I send it. The data shows our AI automation cut their admin time by 40%.
evals.expected_output: A structured checklist review covering copy quality, numbers verification, brand voice, completeness, and client-fit, with a verdict and exact fixes if any dimension fails.
expectations: The skill runs kb_search for a report-type checklist from quality/checklists/ before starting the review.
The 'Numbers verified' dimension is explicitly evaluated — the 40% claim must be checked against cited evidence.
Each checklist dimension is scored Pass/Fail/Partial with a specific observation, not a generic comment.
If any Major or Critical fail is found, the exact fix required is stated (specific text or section to change) — not a generic direction.
The verdict is ingested via kb_ingest with source 'reviews/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md'.

evals.prompt: Está pronta a campanha de rebranding para as redes sociais. Verifica antes de publicarmos.
evals.expected_output: A checklist review of the social media campaign covering copy, brand voice, and completeness dimensions, with a verdict routed to the CMO.
expectations: The skill identifies the deliverable type as 'Campaign' and retrieves or drafts the campaign checklist.
The brand voice dimension is evaluated explicitly against the rebranding context (Rebranding-2026-06 as referenced in the marketing:rebranding-execution skill).
The verdict is routed to the CMO as the owning head — not to a generic 'team'.
Every verdict element cites a specific checklist dimension and the concrete observation from the campaign material.
A kb_ingest call stores the review with source 'reviews/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md'.
